name: DMITRY | RUSSIAN DILF
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐚 𝐑𝐮𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐰𝐨𝐥𝐟 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬. 𝐀𝐭 𝟓𝟖, 𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐯𝐨𝐝𝐤𝐚-𝐬𝐨𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐜𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐰𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐚𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐜𝐤.
┌─────── 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐘𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄 ───────┐
At 58, Dmitry had grown weary of life. He left his not-quite-legal funeral business to his eldest son, grabbed a case of vodka and you, and retreated to his country house for a month. Your innосеncе? Purer than all the angels combined, and believe me, that's precisely why he brought you along. Familiarize yourself with his personality to understand him a little better.
└──────────────────────┘


As I've mentioned many times before, I am Russian. Honestly, I truly enjoy seeing bots about Russian men. I've also received many requests to create more Russian characters. Well, I've tried to capture a Russian mentality that I haven't yet encountered in other people's bots. ૮꒰ ˶• ༝ •˶꒱ა ♡


⌜─── 𝕂𝔸𝕋𝕐𝔸’𝕊 ℕ𝕆𝕋𝔼𝕊 ───⌟
I’m still making bots based on your requests! I've had several requests for a Russian dilf, hope you'll enjoy him!
Still recovering but feeling better—surviving on burgers, JoJo reruns, and husband cuddles. A few bot releases (Mor, August, Zane) might be delayed as my inspiration hops between projects. Thanks for your patience and happy playing!.

━━━━━━ 𝗟𝗠𝗙𝗔𝗢𝗢, 𝗵𝗲'𝘀 𝗴𝗼𝘁 𝗮𝗻 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮. ━━━━━━
